name: Chocolate Bavarian Torte
recipeIngredient: 2 boxes vanilla cake mix, mixed according to package directions
recipeInstructions:
1. Bake the cake mixture in two 9-inch round cake pans according to package directions until done.
2. Allow the cakes to cool in the pans for 15 minutes before transferring them to a wire rack to cool completely.
3. In a large mixing bowl, whip the cream cheese and sugar together until smooth and fluffy.
4. Add vanilla extract and salt to the cream cheese mixture and continue beating until well combined.
5. Gently fold in the whipped heavy whipping cream until incorporated.
6. Split each cooled cake horizontally into two layers using a long knife or bench scraper.
7. Place one of the bottom layers on a serving plate.
8. Spread one-fourth of the cream mixture evenly over the layer.
9. Sprinkle with one-fourth of the chopped dark chocolate.
10. Repeat steps 6-9 with the remaining cake layers, top layer, and cream mixture.
11. Cover the assembled torte tightly and refrigerate for at least 8 hours or overnight to allow flavors to meld and set.
